meta.title: InfoMarina | Marina management software for marinas, yacht clubs and harbours
meta.description: InfoMarina is the complete software solution for managing marinas, yacht clubs and harbours of all sizes. Reservations, billing, interactive layout.
meta.keywords: infomarina, marina software, marina layout, yacht clubs, reservations management, slips, pontoons, moorings

hero.subtitle: Complete software solution for managing marinas and yacht clubs of all sizes

items.title: Reservations
items.subtitle: Module
items.text: Increase your efficiency in managing your slip reservations with InfoMarina.

items.title: Billing
items.subtitle: Available as option
items.text: The module allows you to bill directly within the InfoMarina software.

items.title: Interactive Layout
items.subtitle: Available as option
items.text: The module allows reservations from a visual map of your facilities.

items.title: Acomba

items.text: Transfer accounting transactions from InfoMarina to the ACOMBA accounting software.

services.heading: Overview
services.description: InfoMarina is software for managing slips, pontoons, moorings, marinas, yacht clubs, and harbours of all sizes.

items.title: Reservations Module
items.text: Manage reservations, arrivals, departures, and temporary departures. Waiting list management and statistics consultation and printing.

items.title: Billing Module
items.text: Bill by the hour, day, week, month, or season; sell articles, fuel, and more. Accepts all payment methods.

items.title: Interactive Layout Module
items.text: Manage your site from a customized layout representing your facilities; see day-by-day which slips are complete, incomplete, and available.

items.title: ACOMBA Integration
items.text: Transfer accounting transactions from InfoMarina to the ACOMBA accounting software. Waiting list management and statistics consultation.

portfolio.heading: Screenshots
portfolio.description: From now on, with InfoMarina, paper calendars and large magnetic whiteboards are a thing of the past.

clients.heading: Our Customers...
clients.description: Our main goal in everything we do is customer satisfaction.

items.name: The Washington Marina Company
items.text: Susan Hoffman — « WMC LOVES InfoMarina! It's going GREAT – this is SO much fun! Andre, You know, you and your team are absolutely fantastic. Seriously, your customer support is superior to anything I have ever seen… YOU ARE THE BEST - really, I mean it. »

items.name: Marina de Ville-Marie
items.text: The municipal Marina of Ville-Marie is located steps from downtown and near the magnificent Parc du Centenaire. Equipped with 91 slips with water and electricity services.

items.name: Marina de la Chaudière
items.text: A cooperative marina, Marina de la Chaudière thrives through the close collaboration of its approximately 122 members. Located on the South Shore of the St. Lawrence.

items.name: Marina de Portneuf
items.text: The marina is located on the North Shore of the St. Lawrence, midway between Quebec City and Trois-Rivières. A peaceful spot for rest.

items.name: Marina Taina
items.text: Marina Taina in Punaauia can accommodate approximately 550 boats at dock, on dry land, or in dry storage. 130 moorings are also managed.

items.name: Marina Bouregreg
items.text: Between the Atlantic and the Bouregreg Valley, this magnificent river marina is bordered by prestigious historical sites.

items.name: Marina of Thunder Bay
items.text: Located at Prince Arthur's Landing in Marina Park on the shores of Lake Superior. The Marina offers 271 slips.

items.name: Marina Rose des Vents
items.text: The Marina is known for its magnificent location and superb view of Lake Champlain from the Canadian side.

team.heading: Our Team
